metadata.description: PM-first agent skill marketplace with one public pm-agent entry and downstream PM-orchestrated engineering, QA, DevOps, design, and security capabilities

plugins.name: pm-agent
plugins.description: Dispatcher for product discovery, scope shaping, specs, empty/new-repo app ideas before coding, AI assistant/chat UI concept shaping, competitive research, release communication, roadmaps, and GitHub project status. Hands off to engineer-agent for technical planning and to designer-agent for UI/UX deliverables when those stages apply.

plugins.name: engineer-agent
plugins.description: Downstream engineering capability invoked after pm-agent handoff for confirmed codebase analysis, TRDs, bootstrapping, implementation, tests, debugging, and delivery. Skills remain available for PM-orchestrated execution, not as standalone starting points.

plugins.name: qa-agent
plugins.description: Downstream QA capability invoked after pm-agent handoff for confirmed acceptance, exploratory testing, bug analysis, and regression verification. Requirement or implementation gaps return through the PM-orchestrated handoff path.

plugins.name: devops-agent
plugins.description: Downstream DevOps capability invoked after pm-agent handoff for confirmed deployment planning, CI/CD automation, environment audits, release readiness, rollback, and runbook preparation.

plugins.name: designer-agent
plugins.description: Downstream design capability invoked after pm-agent handoff for confirmed UX flows, information architecture, wireframes, reference-pattern analysis, and reference-backed visual system work.

plugins.name: security-agent
plugins.description: Downstream security capability invoked after pm-agent handoff for confirmed AppSec, auth/authz, dependency risk, privacy, and data-flow reviews, with remediation routed through the PM handoff path.
